text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey, Trainer! So, how was your break?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mine was a blast! I had a super-long video call
with my family for the first time in ages.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters told me what they thought of my races,
and they had a ton of footage to illustrate their
points!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They were telling me how cool my stride looked
and how impressive it was that I didn't look
back... Hehe. I was blushing like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But it made me want to show them wayyy more cool stuff out on the track! All right, time to do this thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Ines Fujin made the most of her
time off!
